en: Now when the queen of Sheba heard of the fame of Solomon concerning the name of the LORD, she came to test him with hard questions.
zh: 示巴女王聽到所羅門因耶和華的名所得的名聲，就來要用難題試試他。

en: She came to Jerusalem with a very great retinue, with camels bearing spices and very much gold and precious stones. And when she came to Solomon, she told him all that was on her mind.
zh: 她帶著大批隨員到耶路撒冷來，又有駱駝馱著香料、許多金子和寶石。她來到所羅門那裡，就把她心裡所有的難題都對他說出來。

en: And Solomon answered all her questions; there was nothing hidden from the king that he could not explain to her.
zh: 所羅門把她所有的問題都給她解說明白，沒有一件事難倒王，使王不能回答她的。

en: And when the queen of Sheba had seen all the wisdom of Solomon, the house that he had built,
zh: 示巴女王看見所羅門的一切智慧和他建造的宮殿、

en: the food of his table, the seating of his officials, and the attendance of his servants, their clothing, his cupbearers, and his burnt offerings that he offered at the house of the LORD, there was no more breath in her.
zh: 桌上的食物、臣僕的座位、僕人的侍候、他們的服飾、王的酒政和王在耶和華的殿獻上的燔祭，就驚奇得不知所措。

en: And she said to the king, "The report was true that I heard in my own land of your words and of your wisdom,
zh: 於是她對王說：“我在本國聽見有關你的事和你的智慧，原來都是真的；

en: but I did not believe the reports until I came and my own eyes had seen it. And behold, the half was not told me. Your wisdom and prosperity surpass the report that I heard.
zh: 以前我並不相信那些話，等到我來了，親眼看見，才知道人告訴我的還不到一半；你的智慧和財富，超過我所聽聞的。

en: Happy are your men! Happy are your servants, who continually stand before you and hear your wisdom!
zh: 屬你的人是有福的，你的這些臣僕是有福的，他們常常侍立在你面前，聆聽你的智慧。

en: Blessed be the LORD your God, who has delighted in you and set you on the throne of Israel! Because the LORD loved Israel forever, he has made you king, that you may execute justice and righteousness."
zh: 耶和華你的 神是應當稱頌的！他喜悅你，使你坐在以色列的王位上；因為耶和華永遠喜愛以色列，所以立你作王，要你秉行公義。”

en: Then she gave the king 120 talents of gold, and a very great quantity of spices and precious stones. Never again came such an abundance of spices as these that the queen of Sheba gave to King Solomon.
zh: 於是示巴女王把約四千公斤金子、大批香料和寶石送給王；以後奉來的香料再也沒有像示巴女王送給所羅門的那麼多。

en: Moreover, the fleet of Hiram, which brought gold from Ophir, brought from Ophir a very great amount of almug wood and precious stones.
zh: 此外，從俄斐運金子來的希蘭船隊，又從俄斐運了大批檀香木和寶石來。

en: And the king made of the almug wood supports for the house of the LORD and for the king's house, also lyres and harps for the singers. No such almug wood has come or been seen to this day.
zh: 王用檀香木為耶和華的殿和王宮做欄杆，又為歌唱的做琴瑟。以後再也沒有這樣的檀香木運來，也沒有人看見過，直到今日。

en: And King Solomon gave to the queen of Sheba all that she desired, whatever she asked besides what was given her by the bounty of King Solomon. So she turned and went back to her own land with her servants.
zh: 所羅門王照著示巴女王所願所求的一切賜給她，另外又厚厚地餽贈她。於是女王和她的臣僕都返回本國去了。

en: Now the weight of gold that came to Solomon in one year was 666 talents of gold,
zh: 所羅門每年收入的金子重兩萬三千公斤。

en: besides that which came from the explorers and from the business of the merchants, and from all the kings of the west and from the governors of the land.
zh: 另外，還有從商人和行商的課稅，阿拉伯諸王和國內省長的收入。

en: King Solomon made 200 large shields of beaten gold; 600 shekels of gold went into each shield.
zh: 所羅門王用錘煉好的金子做了二百面大盾牌，每一面大盾牌用金子七公斤；

en: And he made 300 shields of beaten gold; three minas of gold went into each shield. And the king put them in the House of the Forest of Lebanon.
zh: 又用錘煉好的金子做了三百面小盾牌，每一面小盾牌用金子兩公斤。王把這些盾牌都放在黎巴嫩林宮。

en: The king also made a great ivory throne and overlaid it with the finest gold.
zh: 王又做了一個象牙大寶座，貼上了精金。

en: The throne had six steps, and at the back of the throne was a calf's head, and on each side of the seat were armrests and two lions standing beside the armrests,
zh: 那寶座有六級臺階，寶座的後背有一個圓頂，座處的兩旁有一個扶手。扶手的旁邊各有一隻獅子站立著。

en: while twelve lions stood there, one on each end of a step on the six steps. The like of it was never made in any kingdom.
zh: 在六級臺階上共有十二隻獅子站著，左邊一隻，右邊一隻。在列國中都沒有這樣做過。

en: All King Solomon's drinking vessels were of gold, and all the vessels of the House of the Forest of Lebanon were of pure gold. None were of silver; silver was not considered as anything in the days of Solomon.
zh: 所羅門的一切飲器都是金子做的；黎巴嫩林宮裡的一切器皿也都是精金做的，沒有用銀子做的；原來在所羅門王的時代，銀子算不得甚麼。

en: For the king had a fleet of ships of Tarshish at sea with the fleet of Hiram. Once every three years the fleet of ships of Tarshish used to come bringing gold, silver, ivory, apes, and peacocks.
zh: 因為王有他施船隊與希蘭船隊一同在海上航行。他施船隊三年一次運來金銀、象牙、猿猴和孔雀。

en: Thus King Solomon excelled all the kings of the earth in riches and in wisdom.
zh: 所羅門王的財富和智慧，超過了世界上所有的君王。

en: And the whole earth sought the presence of Solomon to hear his wisdom, which God had put into his mind.
zh: 世上所有的人都要求晉見所羅門，聆聽 神賦予他心中的智慧。

en: Every one of them brought his present, articles of silver and gold, garments, myrrh, spices, horses, and mules, so much year by year.
zh: 他們各人都帶著自己的貢物而來，就是銀器、金器、衣裳、軍械、香料、馬和騾等，年年都是這樣。

en: And Solomon gathered together chariots and horsemen. He had 1,400 chariots and 12,000 horsemen, whom he stationed in the chariot cities and with the king in Jerusalem.
zh: 所羅門聚集戰車和騎兵，他有戰車一千四百輛，騎兵一萬二千人，安置在屯車城和耶路撒冷，就是與王在一起。

en: And the king made silver as common in Jerusalem as stone, and he made cedar as plentiful as the sycamore of the Shephelah.
zh: 王在耶路撒冷使銀子好像石頭一樣，使香柏木好像平原的桑樹那麼多。

en: And Solomon's import of horses was from Egypt and Kue, and the king's traders received them from Kue at a price.
zh: 所羅門的馬是從埃及和古厄運出來的，是王的商人從古厄按著定價買來的。

en: A chariot could be imported from Egypt for 600 shekels of silver and a horse for 150, and so through the king's traders they were exported to all the kings of the Hittites and the kings of Syria.
zh: 從埃及運上來的車，每輛銀子六千八百四十克，馬每匹一千七百一十克。赫人眾王和亞蘭 諸王也都是這樣經他們的手買來的。
